name: NeuBase Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: NeuBase Therapeutics, Inc., a pre-clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development of therapies to treat rare genetic diseases and cancers caused by mutant genes. The company's proprietary modular peptide-nucleic acid antisense oligo (PATrOL) platform focuses on addressing Huntington's disease (HD) and myotonic dystrophy, as well as other genetic disorders and cancer. Its lead programs include NT0100, a PATrOL enabled anti-gene for Huntington's disease; and NT0200, a PATrOL enabled anti-gene for myotonic dystrophy type 1. NeuBase Therapeutics, Inc. is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
